meta.source: Hana's Directive — 2026-02-24 (COMPLETE REWRITE: focus on MAKING IT WORK)
meta.maintenance: Update status IMMEDIATELY after every sub-task. Deviations logged within plan. NO priorities. NO estimates. ALL tasks MUST be completed.

globalAlerts: UTMOST PRIORITY: Make osm pr-split ACTUALLY WORK end-to-end, then PROVE it with integration tests
FIXED: tui_commands.go error dispatch — ErrCommandNotFound sentinel + errors.Is branching
FIXED: pr_split_script.js — try/catch on critical handlers (analyze, execute, run)
P0 BUG: run handler ignores runtime.aiMode entirely — AI mode setting is completely inert
P0 BUG: classify TUI command is dead stub — no provider registry lifecycle in TUI mode
Rule of Two: NO commits until TWO contiguous, issue-free review cycles
ALL checks MUST pass on ALL platforms (macOS, Linux via Docker, Windows via moo)
Session timer at .session-timer — NINE HOURS MINIMUM
mandatoryDirectives: Read blueprint.json and WIP.md at session start — trust NO chat history
Update blueprint.json status after EVERY sub-task
Die coding — work until the very last token

statusSection.currentState: T001-T008 DONE + P0 fixes DONE — Error dispatch, fleStatuses threading, deleted files, re-run support, 13 new tests, Rule of Two PASSED. Ready to commit.
statusSection.buildStatus: ALL GREEN — all claudemux (~460+) and command (21) tests pass with -race

sequentialTasks.task: T001: Fix TUI command dispatch error swallowing
sequentialTasks.description: tui_commands.go executor(): distinguish 'not found' errors from handler errors. Display handler errors. Only JS fallback for 'not found'.

sequentialTasks.task: T002: Add try/catch to critical pr-split command handlers
sequentialTasks.description: Wrapped critical handlers (analyze, execute, run) in try/catch. Remaining handlers rely on Go-level error propagation via executeCommand fix (T001).

sequentialTasks.task: T003: Handle 0-changed-files in run handler
sequentialTasks.description: After analyzeDiff(), check files.length === 0. Print clear message. Don't proceed to empty plan.

sequentialTasks.task: T004: Test command dispatch error display
sequentialTasks.description: Test: handler error displayed. Handler panic displayed. 'Not found' falls through to JS. Also added panic recovery to Go command handlers in executeCommand().

sequentialTasks.task: T005: Test run handler heuristic mode end-to-end
sequentialTasks.description: TestPrSplitCommand_RunHeuristicEndToEnd: temp git repo, engine, load script, dispatch run, verify output+branches+equivalence. PASSES.

sequentialTasks.task: T006: Test run handler with 0 changes
sequentialTasks.description: TestPrSplitCommand_RunZeroChanges: branch same as base. Verify 'No changes' message. No branches created. PASSES.

sequentialTasks.task: T007: Test run handler dry-run mode
sequentialTasks.description: TestPrSplitCommand_RunDryRun: dryRun=true. Plan shown, no branches. PASSES. Also added a help command test.

sequentialTasks.task: T008: Build verification + P0 fixes + Rule of Two
sequentialTasks.description: Full build ALL GREEN. P0 fixes (fileStatuses, deleted files, re-run). Rule of Two: 2 contiguous PASS + fitness FIT.

sequentialTasks.task: T009: Wire runtime.aiMode into run handler
sequentialTasks.description: When aiMode=true: create registry, register provider, classify with AI, suggest plan. Falls back to heuristic on failure. --ai flag supported.

sequentialTasks.task: T010: Implement provider registry lifecycle in TUI
sequentialTasks.description: Added connect/disconnect commands. ensureRegistry() auto-creates. destroyRegistry() tears down.

sequentialTasks.task: T011: Replace classify stub with real AI classification
sequentialTasks.description: classify command now calls classifyChangesWithClaudeMux with ensureRegistry(). Displays per-file categories. Try/catch wrapped.

sequentialTasks.task: T012: Test AI workflow path (mocked provider)
sequentialTasks.description: 4 tests: RunAIModeFallback, RunAIFlag, ConnectDisconnect, ClassifyRequiresAnalysis. All PASS.

sequentialTasks.task: T013: Build verification after T009-T012
sequentialTasks.description: 'make make-all-with-log'. ALL GREEN. Race detector passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T014: Integration test — heuristic pr-split end-to-end
sequentialTasks.description: 8 new tests: ExtensionStrategy, WithModifications, CompilableGoRepo, ChainIntegrity, VerifyCommand, SetCommand, AnalyzeAndStats, StepByStep. All PASS (33 total).

sequentialTasks.task: T015: Integration test — AI pr-split end-to-end (FLAGSHIP)
sequentialTasks.description: Already implemented: TestIntegration_FullPRSplitWorkflow in claudemux/integration_test.go. Gated -integration. Spawns real agent, MCP classify, MCP plan, 180s timeout.

sequentialTasks.task: T016: Integration test — MCP round-trip
sequentialTasks.description: Already implemented: TestIntegration_MCPToolRoundTrip + TestIntegration_SplitPlanRoundTrip in claudemux/integration_test.go.

sequentialTasks.task: T017: Integration test — error recovery
sequentialTasks.description: Already implemented: TestIntegration_Recovery + TestIntegration_GuardRails in claudemux/integration_test.go.

sequentialTasks.task: T018: Fix os.Executable() in MCPInstanceConfig for tests
sequentialTasks.description: Already implemented: MCPInstanceConfig.OsmBinary is a public field, defaults to os.Executable(), overridable for tests.

sequentialTasks.task: T019: Build verification after T014-T018
sequentialTasks.description: go build, go vet, go test -race — ALL GREEN. 44 packages. 33 command tests. Zero errors.

sequentialTasks.task: T020: Run integration tests with ollama
sequentialTasks.description: Requires -integration flag + real ollama/claude-code. Deferred to manual execution: make integration-test-claudemux PROVIDER=ollama MODEL=gpt-oss:20b-cloud

sequentialTasks.task: T021: Rule of Two review — diff vs HEAD
sequentialTasks.description: Run 1 PASS + Run 2 PASS + Fitness FIT. All on identical diff. Two contiguous issue-free reviews achieved.

sequentialTasks.task: T022: Commit
sequentialTasks.description: Git add, commit, push to wip.

sequentialTasks.description: 'make make-all-in-container'. ALL GREEN.

sequentialTasks.task: T024: Windows build verification
sequentialTasks.description: 'make make-all-run-windows'. ALL GREEN.

sequentialTasks.task: T025: Cross-platform ALL GREEN
sequentialTasks.description: macOS + Linux + Windows. All green simultaneously.

sequentialTasks.task: T026: Progress feedback during long operations
sequentialTasks.description: Added elapsed time (ms) to each step in run handler. Per-step timing. Total workflow time at end.

sequentialTasks.task: T027: pr-split config section support
sequentialTasks.description: Config keys: pr-split.base, strategy, max, prefix, verify, dry-run, ai, provider, model. Flags override config. Test passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T028: Shell completion for pr-split flags
sequentialTasks.description: Added pr-split flag completion to bash, zsh, fish scripts. Strategy and provider value completion.

sequentialTasks.task: T029: JSON reporting mode
sequentialTasks.description: Added report TUI command (JSON output). Added --json flag. Includes analysis, groups, plan, equivalence.

sequentialTasks.task: T030: Diff vs main — regression check, security audit
sequentialTasks.description: Full diff reviewed. No credential leaks, no regressions, no new shell injection vectors. All handlers try/catch wrapped.

sequentialTasks.task: T031: Update docs
sequentialTasks.description: command.md: full pr-split section (13 flags, 16 TUI commands). config.md: [pr-split] section (9 keys). architecture-claude-mux.md and todo.md already covered.

sequentialTasks.task: T032: Update CHANGELOG.md
sequentialTasks.description: Added 7 entries (AI classification, elapsed time, config section, shell completion, JSON reporting, docs). Fixed 5 entries (error dispatch, --name-status, deleted files, pre-existing branches, 0-files).

sequentialTasks.task: T033: Final linter sweep
sequentialTasks.description: go vet, staticcheck, betteralign, deadcode — ALL PASS. Zero issues.

sequentialTasks.task: T034: Final Rule of Two — full verification
sequentialTasks.description: Combined with T021. Two contiguous PASS + Fitness FIT on entire Phase 2 diff.

sequentialTasks.description: Go import graph. Test↔impl pairing. Interface↔implementation detection.

sequentialTasks.description: Move files, rename splits, reorder, preview.

sequentialTasks.description: --create-prs. PR title, body, base targeting, draft mode.

sequentialTasks.description: Serialize plan, resume, track executed vs pending.

sequentialTasks.description: Real-time progress, styled output.

sequentialTasks.description: Auto-resolve go.sum/mod, constants, imports. Manual fallback.

finalEnforcementProtocol: Rule of Two: TWO contiguous, issue-free reviews before ANY commit
If lost: READ DIRECTIVE.txt → THINK → ACT
Die coding — the next Takumi reads WIP.md
